title.en: China-to-Australia Wireless / IoT Device Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国无线/物联网设备进入澳大利亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國無線/物聯網裝置進入澳洲：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China wireless and IoT device documentation against Australian ACMA radiocommunications, EMC, telecommunications labelling, RCM marking, EESS electrical safety, and responsible supplier registration obligations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国无线及物联网设备文件与澳大利亚ACMA无线电通信、电磁兼容、电信标签、RCM标志、EESS电气安全及责任供应商注册义务的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國無線及物聯網裝置文件與澳洲ACMA無線電通訊、電磁相容、電信標籤、RCM標誌、EESS電氣安全及責任供應商註冊義務的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, ACMA or EESS determination, customs decision, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Australian law, ACMA instruments, EESS requirements, AS/NZS standards, and state or territory electrical safety rules with qualified professionals before shipment or supply.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、ACMA或EESS裁定、海关决定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或供应前，应与合格专业人士核验现行澳大利亚法律、ACMA法规文件、EESS要求、AS/NZS标准以及州或领地电气安全规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、ACMA或EESS裁定、海關決定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或供應前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行澳洲法律、ACMA法規文件、EESS要求、AS/NZS標準以及州或領地電氣安全規則。

answer_first.en: The main Australia gaps for a China-made Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, or IoT device are ACMA radiocommunications compliance under the Radiocommunications Equipment (General) Rules 2021, ACMA EMC compliance, telecommunications customer equipment labelling where a network interface is present, RCM labelling, EESS electrical safety where the product is in-scope electrical equipment, and registration by an Australian responsible supplier. AS/NZS 4268, CISPR 32 / AS/NZS CISPR 32, and related AS/NZS standards are voluntary presumption or evidence routes, not the mandatory law themselves.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的Wi-Fi、蓝牙或物联网设备进入澳大利亚的主要差距包括：依据《Radiocommunications Equipment (General) Rules 2021》的ACMA无线电通信合规、ACMA电磁兼容合规、带网络接口时的电信客户设备标签、RCM标签、产品属于EESS范围内电气设备时的电气安全要求，以及由澳大利亚责任供应商完成注册。AS/NZS 4268、CISPR 32 / AS/NZS CISPR 32及相关AS/NZS标准是自愿的推定符合或证据路径，不是强制法律本身。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的Wi-Fi、藍牙或物聯網裝置進入澳洲的主要差距包括：依據《Radiocommunications Equipment (General) Rules 2021》的ACMA無線電通訊合規、ACMA電磁相容合規、帶網路介面時的電信客戶設備標籤、RCM標籤、產品屬於EESS範圍內電氣設備時的電氣安全要求，以及由澳洲責任供應商完成註冊。AS/NZS 4268、CISPR 32 / AS/NZS CISPR 32及相關AS/NZS標準是自願的推定符合或證據路徑，不是強制法律本身。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, notified body, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
